T0172.title: Counter Channel
T0172.definition: A black-market code name for an insider within a bank, implying their ability to provide authentic and reliable financial data.
T0172.description: 柜台通常指被收买或利用的银行职员，他们滥用权限非法查询客户账户、流水等敏感信息。黑产以此标榜数据来源权威、时效性强，用于吸引买家。这类内鬼行为直接破坏金融机构公信力，是金融诈骗和洗钱活动的重要一环。
T0172.usageExample: "Counter service, full range available. Returns on Sunday. Prices are super low, hit me up for orders."
